root.description: Name of the configuration object/file stored in the S3 bucket
root.name: s3_configuration_object_key

root.description: Determines whether an S3 configuration is used
root.name: use_s3_configuration

root.description: The content of the configuration or the configuration data
root.name: hosted_config_version_content

root.description: Total amount of time for a deployment to last. Minimum value of 0, maximum value of 1440
root.name: deployment_strategy_deployment_duration_in_minutes

root.description: Type of configurations contained in the profile. Valid values: `AWS.AppConfig.FeatureFlags` and `AWS.Freeform`
root.name: config_profile_type

root.description: A URI to locate the configuration. You can specify the AWS AppConfig hosted configuration store, Systems Manager (SSM) document, an SSM Parameter Store parameter, or an Amazon S3 object
root.name: config_profile_location_uri

root.description: A map of additional tags to apply to the configuration profile
root.name: config_profile_tags

root.description: ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the configuration retrieval role
root.name: retrieval_role_permissions_boundary

root.description: Determines whether an SSM parameter configuration is used
root.name: use_ssm_parameter_configuration

root.description: Determines whether an SSM document configuration is used
root.name: use_ssm_document_configuration

root.description: Total amount of time for a deployment to last. Minimum value of 0, maximum value of 1440
root.name: deployment_strategy_final_bake_time_in_minutes

root.description: The percentage of targets to receive a deployed configuration during each interval. Minimum value of 1, maximum value of 100
root.name: deployment_strategy_growth_factor

root.description: ARN of the configuration SSM parameter
root.name: ssm_parameter_configuration_arn

root.description: Determines whether a hosted configuration is used
root.name: use_hosted_configuration

root.description: Where to save the deployment strategy. Valid values: `NONE` and `SSM_DOCUMENT`
root.name: deployment_strategy_replicate_to

root.description: A map of additional tags to apply to the deployment
root.name: deployment_tags

root.description: Determines whether configuration retrieval IAM role is created
root.name: create_retrieval_role

root.description: The algorithm used to define how percentage grows over time. Valid value: `LINEAR` and `EXPONENTIAL`. Defaults to `LINEAR`
root.name: deployment_strategy_growth_type

root.description: A description of the deployment. Can be at most 1024 characters
root.name: deployment_description

root.description: The configuration version to deploy. Can be at most 1024 characters
root.name: deployment_configuration_version

root.description: The name for the application. Must be between 1 and 64 characters in length
root.name: name

root.description: The ARN of the configuration S3 bucket
root.name: s3_configuration_bucket_arn

root.description: Determines whether a deployment strategy is created
root.name: create_deployment_strategy

root.description: A description of the deployment strategy. Can be at most 1024 characters
root.name: deployment_strategy_description

root.description: Map of attributes for AppConfig environment resource(s)
root.name: environments

root.description: A set of methods for validating the configuration. Maximum of 2
root.name: config_profile_validator

root.description: Determines whether to a name or name-prefix strategy is used on the role
root.name: retrieval_role_use_name_prefix

root.description: Path to the configuration retrieval role
root.name: retrieval_role_path

root.description: A map of additional tags to apply to the configuration retrieval role
root.name: retrieval_role_tags

root.description: A map of additional tags to apply to the deployment strategy
root.name: deployment_strategy_tags

root.description: A list of tag blocks. Each element should have keys named key, value, and propagate_at_launch
root.name: tags

root.description: The description of the application. Can be at most 1024 characters
root.name: description

root.description: The description of the configuration profile. Can be at most 1024 characters
root.name: config_profile_description

root.description: ARN of the configuration SSM document
root.name: ssm_document_configuration_arn

root.description: A standard MIME type describing the format of the configuration content. For more information, see [Content-Type](https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec14.html#sec14.17)
root.name: hosted_config_version_content_type

root.description: An existing AppConfig deployment strategy ID
root.name: deployment_strategy_id

root.description: Determines whether resources are created
root.name: create

root.description: The name for the configuration retrieval role
root.name: retrieval_role_name

root.description: A name for the deployment strategy. Must be between 1 and 64 characters in length
root.name: deployment_strategy_name

root.description: A description of the configuration
root.name: hosted_config_version_description

root.description: The name for the configuration profile. Must be between 1 and 64 characters in length
root.name: config_profile_name

root.description: The ARN of an IAM role with permission to access the configuration at the specified `location_uri`. A retrieval role ARN is not required for configurations stored in the AWS AppConfig `hosted` configuration store. It is required for all other sources that store your configuration
root.name: config_profile_retrieval_role_arn

root.description: Description of the configuration retrieval role

root.name: retrieval_role_name

root.name: retrieval_role_policy_name
